title: Netherite Shulkers Reforged
description: An unofficial port/rework of Netherite Shulkers for Fabric.
body:
This mod is a port of [Netherite Shulkers for Fabric by SuitedLlama](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/netherite-shulkers)

The Netherite Shulker Box is invulnerable to explosions, and its item form is completely invulnerable. The Shulker Box also has twice the inventory size of the regular Shulker Box.

Compatible with Quark's preview & right-click-to-add features, and Shulker Enchantments
